data.description:

NN ( (NNBR) ) has provided an update.

On January 29, 2026, NN, Inc., a Delaware corporation, amended its existing Term Loan Credit Agreement originally dated April 16, 2025, which provides for a $118 million funded term loan and an additional $10 million in delayed draw term loan commitments. The amendment removed the prior requirement for an equity raise as a condition to accessing the $10 million delayed draw term loans, and NN, Inc. simultaneously drew the full $10 million, a move that increased its available liquidity and may provide greater flexibility in managing its capital structure and financing needs.

The most recent analyst rating on (NNBR) stock is a Buy with a $6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NN stock, see the NNBR Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Comstock Mining Completes Public Offering to Fund Expansion
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Comstock Mining ( (LODE) ).

On January 28, 2026, Comstock Inc. entered into an underwriting agreement with Titan Partners Group LLC for an underwritten public offering of 18,181,819 shares of common stock, with a 30‑day option for the underwriter to purchase up to an additional 2,727,272 shares to cover over‑allotments, and agreed to issue underwriter warrants equal to 7% of the total shares sold, exercisable from 180 days after signing for five years at $3.1625 per share. The offering, made off an effective shelf registration statement, closed on January 30, 2026 and generated approximately $50 million in gross proceeds, which Comstock plans to deploy primarily toward capital expenditures for Comstock Metals LLC’s second industry-scale facility, development of refining processes and solutions, accelerated site selection and metals market growth, while the company and its directors and executives are subject to a 30‑day lock‑up on share sales, underscoring a near-term focus on funding expansion of its clean metals operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (LODE) stock is a Sell with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Comstock Mining stock, see the LODE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LODE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LODE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (losses, negative margins, and negative operating/free cash flow) and a bearish technical trend (below key moving averages). Offsetting this, management’s recent capital raise, debt elimination, and strong cash position improve near-term flexibility, with additional positive liquidity/strategy updates from recent corporate actions.

To see Spark’s full report on LODE stock, click here.

More about Comstock Mining

Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) operates in the clean energy and critical minerals sector, developing and commercializing technologies, systems and supply chains that convert under‑utilized natural resources, primarily end-of-life photovoltaic materials, into reusable metals such as silver, aluminum, gold and other critical minerals.

data.title: Avidity Biosciences Sets February Vote on $72-per-Share Novartis Takeover and Cardiology Spin-Off
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Avidity Biosciences ( (RNA) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

On January 30, 2026, Avidity Biosciences issued a definitive proxy statement convening a virtual special shareholders’ meeting for February 23, 2026 to vote on a proposed acquisition by Novartis AG and a related spin-off transaction. Under an October 25, 2025 merger agreement, Novartis’ Ajax Acquisition Sub would merge with Avidity, making Avidity an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of Novartis and converting each Avidity share into the right to receive $72 in cash, subject to shareholder approval by a majority of outstanding shares. In parallel, a separation and distribution agreement signed the same day would reorganize Avidity’s business so that a new subsidiary, Atrium Therapeutics (SpinCo), holds the company’s early-stage precision cardiology programs and certain collaborations, with those assets either distributed pro rata as SpinCo shares to Avidity shareholders (one SpinCo share for every ten Avidity shares) or potentially sold to a third party, with net cash proceeds distributed to shareholders and equity award holders. The board unanimously endorsed the merger and spin-off package, recommended shareholders vote in favor of the transactions and related proposals, and outlined appraisal rights for investors who oppose the deal, underscoring that completion of both the merger and spin-off hinges on shareholder approval at the February meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNA) stock is a Hold with a $72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avidity Biosciences stock, see the RNA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RNA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RNA is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects a mix of strong technical momentum and positive corporate events, particularly the merger with Novartis, which is a major strategic development. However, financial performance challenges, including negative profitability and cash flow, weigh on the score. The valuation reflects typical biotech growth characteristics, with a focus on future potential rather than current earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on RNA stock, click here.

More about Avidity Biosciences

Avidity Biosciences, Inc., based in San Diego, is a biotechnology company developing RNA-based therapies, including programs in early-stage precision cardiology targeting rare genetic cardiomyopathies such as phospholamban-related disease and Protein Kinase AMP-activated non-catalytic subunit Gamma 2 Syndrome. The company also maintains collaboration agreements with large pharmaceutical partners including Bristol-Myers Squibb and Eli Lilly, and operates within the broader biopharmaceutical sector focused on rare and serious diseases.

Average Trading Volume: 2,736,444

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $10.92B

Find detailed analytics on RNA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NurExone Adds Healthcare Heavyweight Eyal Gabbai to Board as It Advances Exosome Platform
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NurExone Biologic ( (TSE:NRX) ) has provided an announcement.

NurExone Biologic has appointed Eyal Gabbai to its board of directors, replacing Gadi Riesenfeld, who will continue to serve on the company’s Scientific Advisory Board. The company expects Gabbai’s experience leading major healthcare organizations, overseeing complex government policy and privatization processes, and working with global investors to support its transition from preclinical development toward first-in-human milestones and to strengthen its approach to capital markets and strategic partnerships. Management highlighted that his background in healthcare system economics, technology adoption, and regulated public-company environments should bolster NurExone’s efforts to build out its exosome-based regenerative medicine platform, pursue near-term revenue opportunities via exosome supply and collaborations, and position the firm more competitively with public-market stakeholders and international partners.

More about NurExone Biologic

NurExone Biologic is a publicly listed biotechnology company focused on developing regenerative exosome-based therapies for central nervous system injuries. Its lead candidate, ExoPTEN, has shown strong preclinical potential in treating acute spinal cord and optic nerve injuries, targeting multi-billion-dollar markets. The company is advancing toward clinical trials in the U.S. and Europe, supported by regulatory milestones such as Orphan Drug Designation, and also plans to commercialize exosome supply and minimally invasive targeted delivery systems through its operations, including its U.S. subsidiary Exo-Top Inc.

Average Trading Volume: 20,906

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$48.98M

data.title: TuHURA Biosciences Receives Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Notice
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from TuHURA Biosciences ( (HURA) ).

On January 29, 2026, TuHURA Biosciences disclosed that it had received a notice from Nasdaq stating that its common stock had closed below $1.00 per share for 35 consecutive business days as of January 28, 2026, placing the company out of compliance with the exchange’s minimum bid price rule for continued listing. The company has been granted an initial 180-calendar day grace period, until July 28, 2026, to restore compliance by maintaining a closing bid price of at least $1.00 for a minimum of ten consecutive business days, with the possibility of an additional 180-day extension if certain other listing criteria are met and, if needed, a reverse stock split is pursued. While the notice does not immediately affect trading or SEC reporting requirements, continued non-compliance could ultimately lead to delisting proceedings, adding pressure on management to stabilize the share price and preserve the company’s Nasdaq listing status.

The most recent analyst rating on (HURA) stock is a Hold with a $0.54 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TuHURA Biosciences stock, see the HURA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HURA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HURA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, and rising cash burn) and bearish technicals (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events provide a modest offset via added financing and pipeline/strategic progress, while valuation signals are limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on HURA stock, click here.

More about TuHURA Biosciences

TuHURA Biosciences, Inc. is a publicly traded biotechnology company whose shares are listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market, making it subject to Nasdaq’s continued listing standards, including minimum bid price requirements.

data.title: Athena Technology Acquisition II plans merger with Ace Green
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Athena Technology Acquisition Corp II Class A ( (ATEK) ) is now available.

On December 4, 2024, Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II signed a Business Combination Agreement with Ace Green Recycling, Inc. and a merger subsidiary under which the subsidiary will merge into Ace Green, leaving Ace Green as a wholly owned subsidiary of Athena and its security holders becoming security holders of Athena. Both Athena and Ace Green plan to hold special stockholder meetings to vote on the transaction, which is detailed in a registration statement filed with the SEC on April 30, 2025, and Ace Green’s management has prepared an investor presentation for potential investors. The deal remains subject to multiple closing conditions, including stockholder approvals and a Nasdaq listing of the combined company’s shares, and the parties highlight extensive risks around Ace Green’s limited operating history, capital needs, execution and regulatory challenges for its U.S. expansion, customer concentration, commodity price volatility, and the possibility the merger could be delayed, terminated, or adversely affect the trading performance of Athena’s stock.

More about Athena Technology Acquisition Corp II Class A

Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II is a Delaware-incorporated special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) focused on effecting mergers or similar business combinations, and it has entered into an agreement to combine with Ace Green Recycling, Inc., a battery recycling technology company built on proprietary intellectual property and developing large-scale recycling facilities, including a flagship U.S. plant aimed at serving the growing green energy and recovered-materials markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $99.34M

data.title: VivoPower Shareholders Back Capital and Governance Overhaul at January 30 EGM
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

VivoPower International ( (VVPR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 30, 2026, VivoPower International PLC reported that shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting overwhelmingly approved all six resolutions proposed, each receiving at least 93% of votes cast. The measures authorize directors to issue ordinary and convertible shares, remove statutory pre-emption rights for certain equity issuances, adopt a dual-class share structure including a new class of convertible preferred shares, raise the share cap under the company’s Omnibus Incentive Plan 2017 from 10% to 15%, and give the board flexibility to adjust director and executive pay to market benchmarks, collectively modernizing VivoPower’s capital structure and incentives to support its growth plans and talent retention.

The most recent analyst rating on (VVPR) stock is a Sell with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VivoPower International stock, see the VVPR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VVPR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VVPR is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (losses, leverage/instability, and negative operating/free cash flow). Technicals are mixed with only modest near-term strength against a longer-term downtrend, while valuation signals are constrained by a negative P/E and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on VVPR stock, click here.

More about VivoPower International

VivoPower International PLC is a B Corp-certified global developer and owner of powered land and data center infrastructure tailored for AI compute applications, operating across the UK, Australia, North America, Europe, the Middle East and Southeast Asia. Founded in 2014 and listed on Nasdaq since 2016, the company is scaling a power-to-X strategy around low-cost, sustainable powered land and data center assets in select sovereign markets, while preparing to spin out or divest three units: Tembo (electric fleet and related energy solutions), Caret Digital (power-to-X with a focus on renewable power for digital asset mining) and Vivo Federation (XRPL-based blockchain applications with exposure to Ripple Labs shares and XRP).

The latest announcement is out from Rockpoint Gas Storage, Inc. Class A ( (TSE:RGSI) ).

Rockpoint Gas Storage Inc. announced it will release its third fiscal quarter 2026 results before markets open on February 10, 2026, followed by a webcast and conference call hosted by senior management and a live Q&A session for investors and analysts. Its storage assets, with a 38-year operating history and managed by an experienced leadership team, support reliable and stable natural gas supply and are positioned to benefit from rising demand driven by LNG exports, gas-fired power generation for data centers, oil sands activity and broader electrification, offering highly customizable storage solutions critical to customers’ operations.

data.description:

Tevogen Bio Holdings ( (TVGN) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 30, 2026, Tevogen Bio Holdings announced that its Board of Directors plans to evaluate the potential declaration of a one-time special cash dividend to shareholders, contingent on the company achieving future financial milestones such as revenue and earnings targets. Any distribution would depend on Tevogen’s financial performance, capital needs, compliance with solvency requirements under Delaware law, and a final Board determination that a dividend represents the best use of capital at that time, and the company cautioned that there is no assurance a dividend will be declared, nor any certainty regarding its timing or size.

The most recent analyst rating on (TVGN) stock is a Sell with a $0.33 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tevogen Bio Holdings stock, see the TVGN Stock Forecast page.

Technicals add further pressure with a strong downtrend and negative MACD, while valuation metrics offer limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TVGN stock, click here.

More about Tevogen Bio Holdings

Tevogen Bio Holdings is a socially integrated healthcare company focused on affordable, efficient, and scientifically rigorous solutions, leveraging artificial intelligence and precision T cell therapy platforms to develop advanced, life-saving treatments. Its lead initiative, Tevogen Bio, has completed a proof-of-concept clinical trial for single-HLA-restricted, genetically unmodified allogeneic T cells and maintains a pipeline across virology, oncology, and neurology via its proprietary ExacTcell platform, while its Tevogen.AI unit aims to transform drug development using predictive technologies and cloud-based data services, with the company also exploring future moves into generics, biosimilars, medical devices, and innovative insurance products.
